description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a chaise lounge on the left side, upholstered in a light gray fabric. The sofa features a clean, boxy silhouette with straight lines and a low profile, giving it a contemporary appearance suitable for urban environments. It is equipped with five loose, plush cushions—three along the backrest and two on the seat—providing ample comfort and support. The armrests are straight, medium-height, and padded, matching the sofa's overall minimalist design. The sofa stands on six short, square legs, likely made of wood or metal, which are slightly recessed and finished in a darker tone for subtle contrast. The upholstery appears smooth and matte, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, emphasizing a sleek and understated look.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional sofa in light gray fabric with straight armrests, loose cushions, and short, square legs. The design is minimalist and comfortable, ideal for contemporary urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, five loose cushions, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the chaise lounge extension and the thickness of the armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the alignment of the back cushions.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the shorter seat section and the straight armrest profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Five loose cushions: three back cushions and two seat cushions, all uniform in size and shape, arranged to fit the sectional layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at both ends, medium height, padded, with a clean and minimalist profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Six short, square legs positioned at the corners and under the chaise, likely wood or metal, slightly recessed and finished in a darker tone.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest of medium height with three loose back cushions, no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
